me.chan.texas.misc

接口 Recyclable

  • 所有已知实现类:
    Appearance, Background, Box, BreakPoint, Candidate, DefaultRecyclable, Document, DrawableBox, Figure, Foreground, Glue, Node, Paragraph, Paragraph.Builder, Paragraph.Element, Paragraph.Line, Penalty, Segment, Sum, TextBox, TextBox.Attribute, UnderLine, ViewSegment
